=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (5:9-7:4) TS377017: This Effect.gen contains a single return statement. effect(unnecessaryEffectGen)
  Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Remove the Effect.gen, and keep the body"

[D2] (5:9-7:4) TS377083: This `yield*` is applied to a nested `Effect.gen(...)` that can be inlined in the parent Effect generator context. effect(nestedEffectGenYield)
  Fix 0: "Disable nestedEffectGenYield for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable nestedEffectGenYield for entire file"

[D3] (15:9-17:4) TS377017: This Effect.gen contains a single return statement. effect(unnecessaryEffectGen)
  Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Remove the Effect.gen, and keep the body"

[D4] (15:9-17:4) TS377083: This `yield*` is applied to a nested `Effect.gen(...)` that can be inlined in the parent Effect generator context. effect(nestedEffectGenYield)
  Fix 0: "Disable nestedEffectGenYield for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable nestedEffectGenYield for entire file"

[D5] (21:9-23:4) TS377017: This Effect.gen contains a single return statement. effect(unnecessaryEffectGen)
  Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Remove the Effect.gen, and keep the body"

  Fix 0: "Disable nestedEffectGenYield for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable nestedEffectGenYield for entire file"

  Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Remove the Effect.gen, and keep the body"

  Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Remove the Effect.gen, and keep the body"

[D9] (29:11-31:6) TS377083: This `yield*` is applied to a nested `Effect.gen(...)` that can be inlined in the parent Effect generator context. effect(nestedEffectGenYield)
  Fix 0: "Disable nestedEffectGenYield for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable nestedEffectGenYield for entire file"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Remove the Effect.gen, and keep the body" ===

--- file:///.src/nestedEffectGenYield.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics nestedEffectGenYield:warning
import { Effect } from "effect"

export const inEffectGen = Effect.gen(function*() {
	yield* Effect.asVoid(Effect.succeed(1))

	yield* Effect.gen(function*() {
		return 2
	}).pipe(Effect.asVoid)
})

export const inEffectFn = Effect.fn("inEffectFn")(function*() {
	yield* Effect.gen(function*() {
		yield* Effect.succeed(1)
	})
})

export const inEffectFnUntraced = Effect.fnUntraced(function*() {
	yield* Effect.gen(function*() {
		yield* Effect.succeed(1)
	})
})

export const nestedRegularFunction = Effect.gen(function*() {
	const deferred = () =>
		Effect.gen(function*() {
			yield* Effect.gen(function*() {
				yield* Effect.succeed(1)
			})
		})

	return deferred
})


=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable nestedEffectGenYield for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable nestedEffectGenYield for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 2: "Remove the Effect.gen, and keep the body" ===

--- file:///.src/nestedEffectGenYield.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics nestedEffectGenYield:warning
import { Effect } from "effect"

export const inEffectGen = Effect.gen(function*() {
	yield* Effect.gen(function*() {
		yield* Effect.succeed(1)
	})

	yield* Effect.gen(function*() {
		return 2
	}).pipe(Effect.asVoid)
})

export const inEffectFn = Effect.fn("inEffectFn")(function*() {
	yield* Effect.asVoid(Effect.succeed(1))
})

export const inEffectFnUntraced = Effect.fnUntraced(function*() {
	yield* Effect.gen(function*() {
		yield* Effect.succeed(1)
	})
})

export const nestedRegularFunction = Effect.gen(function*() {
	const deferred = () =>
		Effect.gen(function*() {
			yield* Effect.gen(function*() {
				yield* Effect.succeed(1)
			})
		})

	return deferred
})

skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 1: "Disable nestedEffectGenYield for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D5] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D5] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for entire file" ===

=== [D5] Fix 2: "Remove the Effect.gen, and keep the body" ===

--- file:///.src/nestedEffectGenYield.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics nestedEffectGenYield:warning
import { Effect } from "effect"

export const inEffectGen = Effect.gen(function*() {
	yield* Effect.gen(function*() {
		yield* Effect.succeed(1)
	})

	yield* Effect.gen(function*() {
		return 2
	}).pipe(Effect.asVoid)
})

export const inEffectFn = Effect.fn("inEffectFn")(function*() {
	yield* Effect.gen(function*() {
		yield* Effect.succeed(1)
	})
})

export const inEffectFnUntraced = Effect.fnUntraced(function*() {
	yield* Effect.asVoid(Effect.succeed(1))
})

export const nestedRegularFunction = Effect.gen(function*() {
	const deferred = () =>
		Effect.gen(function*() {
			yield* Effect.gen(function*() {
				yield* Effect.succeed(1)
			})
		})

	return deferred
})


=== [D6] Fix 0: "Disable nestedEffectGenYield for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D6] Fix 1: "Disable nestedEffectGenYield for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D7] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D7] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D7] Fix 2: "Remove the Effect.gen, and keep the body" ===

--- file:///.src/nestedEffectGenYield.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics nestedEffectGenYield:warning
import { Effect } from "effect"

export const inEffectGen = Effect.gen(function*() {
	yield* Effect.gen(function*() {
		yield* Effect.succeed(1)
	})

	yield* Effect.gen(function*() {
		return 2
	}).pipe(Effect.asVoid)
})

export const inEffectFn = Effect.fn("inEffectFn")(function*() {
	yield* Effect.gen(function*() {
		yield* Effect.succeed(1)
	})
})

export const inEffectFnUntraced = Effect.fnUntraced(function*() {
	yield* Effect.gen(function*() {
		yield* Effect.succeed(1)
	})
})

export const nestedRegularFunction = Effect.gen(function*() {
	const deferred = () => Effect.gen(function*() {
				yield* Effect.succeed(1)
			})

	return deferred
})


=== [D8] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D8] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D8] Fix 2: "Remove the Effect.gen, and keep the body" ===

--- file:///.src/nestedEffectGenYield.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics nestedEffectGenYield:warning
import { Effect } from "effect"

export const inEffectGen = Effect.gen(function*() {
	yield* Effect.gen(function*() {
		yield* Effect.succeed(1)
	})

	yield* Effect.gen(function*() {
		return 2
	}).pipe(Effect.asVoid)
})

export const inEffectFn = Effect.fn("inEffectFn")(function*() {
	yield* Effect.gen(function*() {
		yield* Effect.succeed(1)
	})
})

export const inEffectFnUntraced = Effect.fnUntraced(function*() {
	yield* Effect.gen(function*() {
		yield* Effect.succeed(1)
	})
})

export const nestedRegularFunction = Effect.gen(function*() {
	const deferred = () => Effect.gen(function*() {
				yield* Effect.succeed(1)
			})

	return deferred
})


=== [D9] Fix 0: "Disable nestedEffectGenYield for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D9] Fix 1: "Disable nestedEffectGenYield for entire file" ===
skipped by default
